home_question: What do you want to do?
home_desc_document: Document. Tap to take a photo of a letter or prescription. I will explain what it says.
home_desc_contacts: Contacts. Tap to call a loved one or send them a photo.
home_desc_health: Health. Tap to manage your medications and medical appointments. I will remind you when to take your medications.
home_desc_map: Map. Tap to see nearby help places.
contacts_tts_intro: My contacts. Tap a button to call a loved one or send them a photo. Long press to hear the button description.
document_tts_intro: Take a photo of a document and I will explain what it says.
document_desc_take_photo: Open the camera to photograph your document.
document_desc_gallery: Choose a photo already taken on your phone.
document_desc_new_photo: Start again with a new document.
document_no_text: No text detected on this document
health_tts_intro: Manage your medications and medical appointments. Long press any item to learn what it does.
health_desc_fab_med: Tap to add a new medication with its schedule.
health_desc_fab_appt: Tap to add a new medical appointment.
health_desc_med: {name}. To be taken at {times}. Swipe left to delete.
health_desc_appt: Appointment with {doctor} for {reason}, on {date} at {time}. Swipe left to delete.
health_desc_tab_med: Medications tab. List of your medications with their schedule and reminders.
health_desc_tab_appt: Appointments tab. List of your upcoming medical appointments with reminders.
help_tts_intro: Ask a question or call for help. Long press any button to learn what it does.
help_disclaimer: ⚠️ This answer is AI-generated. For any important question, consult a professional.
help_desc_mic: Tap to ask a question out loud. I will answer you.
help_desc_samu: Tap to call SAMU, dial 15. For medical emergencies.
help_desc_police: Tap to call the Police, dial 17. For security emergencies.
help_desc_pompiers: Tap to call the Fire Brigade, dial 18. For fires and accidents.
map_tts_intro: Find help locations near you. Long press a marker to learn about the place.
map_desc_directions: Get directions to {name} with Google Maps.
